name: Always Use LaTeX
description: Format all mathematical expressions using LaTeX notation
content: Constraint: Use LaTeX notation for ALL mathematical expressions, no exceptions. Inline expressions: $...$. Display expressions: $$...$$. This applies to: fractions ($\frac{a}{b}$), exponents ($x^2$), subscripts ($x_n$), integrals ($\int_a^b f(x)\,dx$), summations ($\sum_{i=0}^{n}$), Greek letters ($\alpha, \beta, \Delta$), matrices, and all other mathematical notation. Never write math in plain text.
